Discuss

Victor Musical Industries, Inc.

from Apr, 1972 to Apr, 1993
ビクター音楽産業株式会社
Partners: DISCO Co., Ltd., Tokyo Record Corporation
Imprints: flying DOG (Label), HAPPY HOUSE, Invitation, JVC, TAISHITA, Victor
Parent company: Victor Company of Japan, Limited
Succeeded by: Victor Entertainment, Inc. (1993-2014)
Submitted by Carl on Jul 26, 2009 08:18 AM
Type
Label / Imprint
Region
Japan
Former Staff
Akira Higashimoto / 東元晃, Harunobu Komori / 小森治信, Haruyuki Yukawa / 湯川治往, Hideaki Suda / 須田英昭, Hidemi Oku / 奥秀美, Hiroshi Tanaka / 田中弘, Hisahiko Iida / 飯田久彦, Hitoshi Anetai / 姉帯恒, Isamu Senda / 仙田勇, Kenji Takeda / 武田憲二, Kunio Iwamoto / 岩本邦男, Masato Mizushima / 水島正人, Masayoshi Tanaka / 田中正義, Minoru Iwabuchi / 岩渕稔, Sakae Sekine / 関根栄, Satoshi Honda / 本多慧, Satoshi Kamata / 鎌田智, Seisei Yoshida / 良田性正, Shinji Kawahara / 川原伸司, Tamiya Koga / 古賀民也, Teruo Saegusa / 三枝照夫, Toshio Azami / 生明俊雄, Toshiyuki Ebihara / 海老原俊之, Yasushi Endo / 遠藤泰, Yoichi Kakumoto / 赫本庸一
